title: Sorrettuja ja solvaistuja: Romaani

The book likely explores themes of social alienation, human connection, and the emotional turbulence of its main character. The old man's peculiar presence at a local tavern captures the attention of the protagonist and eventually leads to a heart-wrenching moment when he discovers the man’s distress as he realizes the death of his dog.
